items.title: Portrait layout usable
items.how: In portrait: walk, open tabs, read chat. Everything reachable, nothing off-screen.

items.title: Landscape layout usable
items.how: Rotate to landscape: panel docks left, not clipped, not under the minimap/orbs; tabs reachable.

items.title: No overlapping HUD
items.how: Minimap, orbs, XP counter, world-map button don't overlap each other or cover an open panel.

items.title: Panels fit the screen
items.how: Open each tab; the panel fits on-screen and scrolls — nothing cut off.

items.title: Chat collapse / expand
items.how: Tap the chat header bar to collapse, tap again to expand.

items.title: Dialogue bottom sheet
items.how: Talk to Brother Aldric — dialogue is docked at the bottom, not floating mid-screen.

items.title: Objective banner
items.how: After entering, the objective shows at top and auto-hides after a few seconds; tap it to bring it back.

items.title: Inventory tap (default)
items.how: Tap an inventory item — it performs its default action / prints a line.

items.title: Inventory long-press menu
items.how: Long-press an inventory item — an option menu opens (Use/Wield/Eat/Drop/Examine).

items.title: Examine works
items.how: From the long-press menu, Examine prints the item's description to chat.

items.title: Character name entry
items.how: On a fresh character you're asked for a name; an invalid name is blocked, a valid one saves.

items.title: Character-creator live preview
items.how: In the creator, toggle Head/Torso/Legs/Feet and the colour swatches — the figure preview at the top updates live (hood/beard, robe/skirt/trousers, boots/shoes/sandals, colours).

items.title: Creator choices show on the in-world body
items.how: After confirming your character, the 3D body in the world matches your picks: hood/beard/hair, robe vs tunic, skirt/trousers, boots/shoes/sandals, body type, and the colours. Equip a weapon/shield — they appear in the hands.

items.title: Touch targets
items.how: Buttons are comfortably tappable with no mis-taps.

items.title: Test character loaded
items.how: On load you have level 99 in all skills + a combat kit (sword, bow, arrows, runes, food, bones, coins) in the bag.

items.title: Combat smoke test
items.how: Attack the giant rat: you hit it, it can die and respawn. (Long-press the bow + arrows -> Wield for ranged; runes are in the bag for magic.)

items.title: This QA panel
items.how: You can set Pass/Fail/Skip and type a note per item, then Copy or Download the report to send back.

items.title: QA live sync
items.how: As you tap Pass/Fail/notes, the QA panel footer shows 'synced' (needs Vercel KV connected). Your results reach the dev without copy/paste.
